title: Portfolio Assessment Configuration Schema
description: Configuration schema for AWS Transform Portfolio Agentic Readiness Assessment

portfolio_name.description: Name of the portfolio being assessed

transformation_definitions.description: Names of the AWS Transform Custom transformation definitions to use. These must match the names you published to your AWS Transform registry.

individual_assessment.description: Transformation definition name for individual repository assessments

portfolio_assessment.description: Transformation definition name for portfolio-level aggregation

description.description: Optional description of the portfolio and its business purpose

assessment_date.description: Date when this portfolio assessment was configured (YYYY-MM-DD)

repositories.description: List of repositories to include in the portfolio assessment

name.description: Service/repository name (must be unique within portfolio)

repository_url.description: Optional Git repository URL. If provided and path doesn't exist, Kiro will clone the repository automatically

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the repository root directory. If repository_url is provided and this path doesn't exist, it will be cloned here

report_path.description: Optional explicit path to agentic-readiness-report.md (if not in standard location)

priority.description: Business priority for this service (P0=Critical, P1=High, P2=Medium)

tags.description: Optional tags for categorization (e.g., frontend, backend, data, ml)

avoid_technologies.description: Technologies to avoid in recommendations (e.g., kubernetes, docker, serverless)

prefer_technologies.description: Preferred technologies for recommendations (e.g., ecs, fargate, ec2)

avoid_microservices_decomposition.description: If true, avoid recommending breaking this service into microservices

keep_as_monolith.description: If true, explicitly keep this service as a monolith (no decomposition)

modernization_approach.description: Desired pace of modernization (aggressive=big changes, minimal=small incremental changes)

avoid_patterns.description: Architecture patterns to avoid (e.g., event-driven, cqrs, saga)

prefer_patterns.description: Architecture patterns to prefer (e.g., rest-api, graphql, grpc)

avoid_migration.description: If true, avoid recommending database migration

keep_current_database.description: If true, keep current database technology

avoid_managed_services.description: If true, avoid recommending managed database services (RDS, DynamoDB, etc.)

avoid_orchestration.description: If true, avoid container orchestration (EKS, ECS, Kubernetes)

compliance_requirements.description: Compliance requirements that constrain transformation options

budget_constraints.description: Budget constraints for transformation (strict=minimize cost, flexible=optimize for speed)

timeline_constraints.description: Timeline constraints (urgent=fast transformation needed, flexible=can take time)

examples: No breaking changes to public API

transformation_options.description: Configuration options for the portfolio transformation

output_path.description: Path where portfolio-agentic-readiness-report.md will be generated

cross_cutting_threshold.description: Minimum number of services for a gap to be considered cross-cutting

min_services.description: Minimum number of services required for portfolio assessment

include_optional_sections.description: Include optional analysis sections (e.g., detailed tech stack breakdown)

validation_strictness.description: Validation strictness level (strict=fail on warnings, lenient=warnings only)

global_transformation_preferences.description: Global transformation preferences that apply to all services by default (can be overridden at service level)

avoid_technologies.description: Technologies to avoid across all services (e.g., kubernetes, docker, serverless)

prefer_technologies.description: Preferred technologies across all services (e.g., ecs, fargate, ec2)

avoid_microservices_decomposition.description: If true, avoid recommending breaking services into microservices by default

modernization_approach.description: Default pace of modernization for all services

avoid_patterns.description: Architecture patterns to avoid across all services

prefer_patterns.description: Architecture patterns to prefer across all services

avoid_migration.description: If true, avoid recommending database migrations by default

avoid_managed_services.description: If true, avoid recommending managed database services globally

avoid_containers.description: If true, avoid containerization recommendations globally

avoid_orchestration.description: If true, avoid container orchestration globally

prefer_vm_based.description: If true, prefer VM-based deployments globally

budget_constraints.description: Default budget constraints for all services

timeline_constraints.description: Default timeline constraints for all services

dependency_overrides.description: Optional manual dependency declarations (for cases where auto-detection fails)

description.description: Optional description of the dependency relationship

exclusions.description: Services or patterns to exclude from analysis

services.description: List of service names to exclude

path_patterns.description: Glob patterns for paths to exclude (e.g., **/test/**, **/archived/**)

metadata.description: Additional metadata for reporting and tracking

aws_account_ids.description: AWS account IDs where services are deployed

regions.description: AWS regions where services are deployed
